> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add mcp-use/skills --skill mcp-builder --skill chatgpt-app-builder -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/chatgpt-app-builder`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/chatgpt-app-builder.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add mcp-use/skills --skill mcp-builder --skill chatgpt-app-builder -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

From mcp-use/skills (Apache-2, small repo). Build custom ChatGPT apps/GPTs: config, OpenAPI actions, auth (key/oauth), function calling, testing/deploy. For mcp-use framework + OpenAI. Skills for Model Context Protocol and custom GPT actions. Official for the mcp-use framework.

## Install Prerequisites

npx skills add mcp-use/skills --skill chatgpt-app-builder -y -g -a [..]; status=inspect-then-install.

## Upstream Maintainer

[mcp-use/skills](https://github.com/mcp-use/skills) (Apache-2.0).

## Comparable Alternatives

modelcontextprotocol/servers; other action builder skills.

&gt; Evidence from GitHub (mcp-use, microsoft, neondatabase 2026) + catalog; research evidence only - not authority or endorsement.
